BagM Beih. 02, 082 [horoscope][via cams/gkab]

Obverse
o 1o 1

[...] ⸢5⸣

(o 1) [...] 5th, Aristocrates was born.

o 22

[ma]-⸢ri⸣-is-tu-ug-ra-te-e a-lid

o 33

U₄ BI 30 ina A 20 ina 12.30 MAŠ.MAŠ

(o 3) On that day, the Moon was in the Lion. The Sun was in 12;30º Twins.

o 44

30 TA MURU₂ ana NIM pa-ni-šu₂ GAR-MEŠ

(o 4) The Moon set its face from the node to the maximum latitude.

o 55

šum₄-ma TA MURU₂ ana NIM

(o 5) If (the Moon) sets its face from the node to the maximum latitude: goodness (and) greatness.

o 66

pa-ni-šu₂ GAR-MEŠ SIG₅ rab-bu-tu₂

o 77

mul₂BABBAR ina 18 PA ⸢UŠ KI⸣ mul₂BABBAR

(o 7) The White Star (Jupiter) became stationary in 18º Pabilsag. The region of Jupiter: he will be healthy (and) at peace. He will become wealthy. He will live long; long days.

o 88

GIat₂ SILIMat₂ NIG₂.TUK SUMUNbar U₄-MEŠ

o 99

⸢GID₂⸣.DA-MEŠ dele-bat ina 4 MUL₂.MUL₂

(o 9) Venus was in 4º Bull of Heaven.

o 1010

⸢KI⸣ dele-bat e-ma DUku ŠE.GA

(o 10) The region of Venus: acceptance wherever he goes. He will acquire [...] daughters.

o 1111

[... DUMU.MUNUS]-MEŠ TUKUši

o 1212

[... MAŠ].⸢MAŠ⸣ KI ⸢20⸣

(o 12) [...] Twins with the Sun.

r 1r 1

[...] qar-⸢ra⸣-[du]

(r 1) [...] the hero will take first place. He will become more important than (his) brothers. He will rule over his father's house.
